title: Miltenyi MACS Bead Isolation
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"epdv9","text":"This protocol includes the step-by-step used for isolation of a cell popultation of interest using MACS bead technology. The kits used for this protocol were obtained from Miltenyi. Miltenyi isolation kits are based on a simple process, in which biotin conjugated antibody-labelled mononuclear cells are separated from unlabeled cells via a column in the presence of a magnetic field.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"8k3ol","text":"Unless otherwise stated, all steps were performed in a biosafety cabinet under sterile conditions. All reagents were stored at 4oC prior to cell isolation, and kept on ice during sample processing. As per the manufacturers instructions, all light sensitive MACS reagents were kept in the dark. Isolation equipment (Magnet stand and Magentic seperator) were stored at -20oC prior to cell isolation. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":128,"length":1},{"style":"sup","offset":370,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"cja71","text":"Prior to MACS bead isolation, samples must undergo PBMC isolation. For more detail on this pre-isolation process see dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.yfvftn6 [PROTOCOL DOI].","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":[{"key":21,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":null},{"key":"bhb0d","text":"With regards to Miltenyi cell isolation kits, the addition (volume) and incubation of the labelling reagents differes depending on the kit used. However, the overall isolation process remains the same. In instances where 2 labelling reagents are present, the first reagent is added, at the reccommended concentration (according to cell number), and the sample incubated for 5min. Following this the second is added, at the reccommended concentration (according to cell number), and the sample incubated for a further 10min. In instances where just one labelling reagent is present, the reagent is added at the reccommended concentration (according to cell number), and the sample incubated for a total of 15min.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"reagents","mutability":"","data":{"id":3587,"guid":"4105D292341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","name":"15 steps: Isolated PBMCs PBMC Isolation by Dannielle DK Moore washed in 10mL 1x MACS Seperation Buffer Miltenyi Biotec Catalog #130-091-221 at 400xg for 00:10:00 at 23 °C, (Room Temp)
PBMCs resuspended in 1x MACS Seperation Buffer Miltenyi Biotec Catalog #130-091-221 Reccommended volume per 1x10 7 cells according to kit specifications

MACS isolation labelling reagents in Miltenyi Cell isolation Kit Miltenyi Biotec added according to the manufacturers instruction (volume and incubation time). During this step, samples are incubated at 4 °C
Following incubation, 1 mL 1x MACS Seperation Buffer Miltenyi Biotec Catalog #130-091-221 is added to cell suspension
Centrifuge cell suspension at 300xg for 00:10:00 at 4 °C

MACS MultiStand Miltenyi Biotec Catalog #130-042-303 removed from storage and set up in hood. LS Columns Miltenyi Biotec Catalog #130-042-401 Placed in MACS seperator and primed with 3x 1 mL MACS Seperation Buffer Miltenyi Biotec Catalog #130-091-221
Cells resuspended in 500 µL 1x MACS Seperation Buffer Miltenyi Biotec Catalog #130-091-221 up to total cell count of 1x10 8

Cell suspension applied to primed LS Columns Miltenyi Biotec Catalog #130-042-401 Note: Tube in which cells stored rinsed 3x with 1 mL MACS Seperation Buffer Miltenyi Biotec Catalog #130-091-221 and this suspension added to the LS column (wash 1)
LS Column topped up twice with 3 mL MACS Seperation Buffer Miltenyi Biotec Catalog #130-091-221 (Wash 2 and 3)
Flow through collected (isolated cell population of interest during negative selection process)
In seperate tube, plunge LS Column with 3 mL MACS Seperation Buffer Miltenyi Biotec Catalog #130-091-221 (isolated cell population of interest during positive selection process)
Centrifuge cell suspension (containing cell population of interest) at 350xg for 00:10:00 at 4 °C
Resuspend Isolated cells in 500 µL - 2 mL, (depending on cell type) MACS Seperation Buffer Miltenyi Biotec Catalog #130-091-221

Dilute cells in 1:10 ratio with 1x Phosphate-Buffered Saline Lonza Catalog #04-479Q and Trypan Blue Solution 0.4% Sterile-filtered Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #T8154 Count the cells using haemocytometer and microscope. Record observed cell number and cell viability
Aliquot 10 µL cell suspension for sample purity check.
creator: Dannielle DK Moore
